title: 1) Clinical Features
text:
• It is a holistic approach. Cosmetic acupuncture restores systemic health to revitalize the
skin.
• It helps restore symmetry of the face by balancing muscles of the face and neck.
• It is a safe and minimal invasive treatment.
• It has a relatively short treatment time, and patient can return to daily living right after
treatment.
• It is relatively reasonable in treatment cost.
